name: Smart Farming Initiative
shortDescription: IoT sensors for smallholder farmers to optimize irrigation and yields.
problem: Water scarcity and inefficient farming practices affecting yields.
solution: Solar-powered soil moisture sensors with mobile app alerts.

testimonials.name: Mary Atieno
testimonials.quote: My farm yield increased by 40% thanks to real-time water alerts!

name: Digital Literacy for Girls
shortDescription: Coding bootcamps for rural high school girls.
problem: Limited access to tech education for girls in rural areas.
solution: 6-week coding camps teaching HTML/CSS/JS with donated laptops.

testimonials.name: Esther Omondi
testimonials.quote: I built my first website and now dream of becoming a developer.

testimonials.name: John Ochieng
testimonials.quote: Cheaper than charcoal and cleaner for my family.

name: Telemedicine Hub
shortDescription: Remote health consultations for rural clinics.
solution: Video call platform with local nurses as intermediaries.

testimonials.name: Dr. Achieng
testimonials.quote: Saved lives by connecting patients to specialists instantly.

name: Youth Agripreneurs
shortDescription: Training youth in modern farming techniques.
problem: Youth unemployment and aging farming population.
solution: Vocational training in hydroponics and market linkages.

name: School Solar Lights
shortDescription: Solar lighting for night studies in rural schools.

testimonials.name: Headteacher Okumu
testimonials.quote: Students now study after dark with safe lights.

name: Code for Community
shortDescription: Free coding workshops for underprivileged youth.
problem: Lack of tech skills in underserved communities.
solution: Weekly coding clubs teaching practical web dev.
